rulings.Case Title: GARY HOPSTER VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Bayer Cropscience Inc. To Produce Robert E. Sage And Dennis J. Paustenbach For Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, July 5, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiff¿s motion to compel defendant Bayer Cropscience, Inc. to produce Robert E. Sage and Dennis J. Paustenbach for deposition is granted. Plaintiff is entitled to depose Mr. Sage and Mr. Paustenbach because they submitted declarations in support of defendant¿s motion for summary judgment and there is a reasonable possibility that the depositions will result in information enabling plaintiff to oppose defendant¿s summary judgment motion. The requests for sanctions made by both sides are denied. Neither side acted without substantial justification. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Herb'S Sheetmetal'S Responses To San Francisco General Order No. 129 Standard Interrogatories To Defts And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, July 5, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Cross-complainant Carrier Corporation¿s motion to compel Herb¿s Sheetmetal¿s responses to General Order 129 standard interrogatories to defendants and request for monetary sanctions will be heard on July 21, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 per the amended notice filed June 21. = (220/HEK)
